description: This pipeline filters ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap and then annotates the data with the other data. The main steps involve filtering the ROI lists, and then annotating the data.

ef833ccc-b0f0-418a-9b9a-8993306ab4f6.name: annotate-with-data
ef833ccc-b0f0-418a-9b9a-8993306ab4f6.description:
Annotates the incoming data with the other data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

8b4cb9dc-6dd0-4a70-b9c7-a227b0efee20.name: annotate-with-source-slot
8b4cb9dc-6dd0-4a70-b9c7-a227b0efee20.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

72f31be8-e4ae-4922-98a1-16ec12c56f55.name: annotate-with-source-slot
72f31be8-e4ae-4922-98a1-16ec12c56f55.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

fc8ecf29-0eb5-4aca-b420-e03357ce86ed.name: iji-export-image-v2
fc8ecf29-0eb5-4aca-b420-e03357ce86ed.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

41ac88f1-59d9-4af0-a617-79a09505f2c4.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
41ac88f1-59d9-4af0-a617-79a09505f2c4.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.

79bbb6b6-bd46-40d1-bd61-b15996e6796d.name: iji-export-table-v2
79bbb6b6-bd46-40d1-bd61-b15996e6796d.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

dda7cf25-26f2-4343-b558-f05a35f2fa44.name: ij1-roi-to-annotations
dda7cf25-26f2-4343-b558-f05a35f2fa44.description: Extracts properties of the ROI lists and stores them into annotations. This will create a list of annotation values if there are multiple ROI per list, unless you choose the option to only return the first entry. By default, one value per ROI is generated. Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

467c5226-33b8-46dc-98b0-ab65a789d18c.name: table-add-annotation-columns
467c5226-33b8-46dc-98b0-ab65a789d18c.description: Adds column annotations to the table as new columns.

dbfdaf57-2e00-47e6-bbb0-95f6005af794.name: ij1-roi-statistics
dbfdaf57-2e00-47e6-bbb0-95f6005af794.description:
Generates a results table containing ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, an empty reference image is automatically generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

82578fdb-e38a-4e62-9931-0cc05192060a.name: table-merge-columns
82578fdb-e38a-4e62-9931-0cc05192060a.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of columns. The generated table is sized according to the table with the most rows. In missing columns, the values are filled in. The algorithm behind this is not 'smart' and is not capable of supplementing a table with data from another table.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

13f0cd5c-64b8-4485-ab3b-eb650683fa47.name: plot-table:plot-category-statistical-line
13f0cd5c-64b8-4485-ab3b-eb650683fa47.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Statistical line category plot.

a86659bb-90bc-4c3b-abf8-6c2817159084.name: iji-export-image-v2
a86659bb-90bc-4c3b-abf8-6c2817159084.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

3d20b4d7-6f95-4c58-8cd7-78f9dffd1b59.name: plot-table:plot-xy-scatter
3d20b4d7-6f95-4c58-8cd7-78f9dffd1b59.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart XY scatter plot.

d334d33f-ef30-4fd2-8733-511508cffaff.name: table-remove-columns
d334d33f-ef30-4fd2-8733-511508cffaff.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

1bda1660-cf6f-4e19-9778-24a209113b10.name: ij1-roi-filter-by-overlap
1bda1660-cf6f-4e19-9778-24a209113b10.description:
Filters the ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap. The ROI1 output contains all ROI1 input ROI that overlap with any of ROI2. The ROI2 output contains all ROI2 input ROI that overlap with a ROI1 ROI.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cf49ddaa-229b-41b5-9360-01b607d1b650.name: plot-table:plot-xy-line
cf49ddaa-229b-41b5-9360-01b607d1b650.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart XY line plot.

6cd0a53c-b611-40d7-b56e-8dd7d6b0c1e0.name: annotate-with-source-slot
6cd0a53c-b611-40d7-b56e-8dd7d6b0c1e0.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

af26a828-ebd8-4bc6-8d9e-05bbf7ee07ec.name: plot-table:plot-box-and-whisker
af26a828-ebd8-4bc6-8d9e-05bbf7ee07ec.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Box plot.

57ee6049-b3ae-42a5-a8b4-201694a40a88.name: table-add-annotation-columns
57ee6049-b3ae-42a5-a8b4-201694a40a88.description: Adds column annotations to the table as new columns.

9dc4e962-12c2-48cc-afb7-b65c0f3be7e4.name: annotate-with-data
9dc4e962-12c2-48cc-afb7-b65c0f3be7e4.description:
Annotates the incoming data with the other data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

0cde155e-2067-424a-a02f-abe7387ef06a.name: table-merge-tables
0cde155e-2067-424a-a02f-abe7387ef06a.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of rows. Columns are automatically created if they do not exist.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

db040415-ba3d-4342-bb8d-6b5fcaea7cf0.name: plot-table:plot-category-statistical-bar
db040415-ba3d-4342-bb8d-6b5fcaea7cf0.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Statistical bar category plot.

7ad8d247-fd0e-4897-954d-8846e7b6ccb8.name: table-slice-rows
7ad8d247-fd0e-4897-954d-8846e7b6ccb8.description: Allows to select/slice the only specific rows from the input table.
